# v2.2.0 — Agentic Flow Improvements

**Date:** 2025-07-15
**Branch:** `feature-2-v2.2.0`
**Scope:** Agent instructions, templates, quality tooling, workflow architecture
**Excluded:** Agent hooks (separate increment), Coder model change (keeping GPT-5.3-Codex)

---

## Change Log

### Priority 1 — Quick Wins

| Fix | File | Change |
|-----|------|--------|
| 1.1 | `java-architect.agent.md` | Verified: model already set to single value `Claude Sonnet 4.6 (copilot)` — no edit needed |
| 1.2 | `java-coder.agent.md` | Added curl smoke-test step in Verification section (step 5) before GitLab endpoint re-verification |
| 1.3 | `java-coder.agent.md` | Added per-batch handoff mandate: "Return structured delivery summary after EVERY batch" |
| 1.8 | `java-coder.agent.md` | Added no-unplanned-files constraint: "Do not create any files not defined in the plan slices" |
| 1.4 | `team-lead.agent.md` | Added curl smoke-check gate in Coder Invocation Strategy before Reviewer Phase 2 |
| 1.5 | `team-lead.agent.md` | Clarified red card counter tracks only coder-caused false positives, not plan/process issues |
| 1.6 | `test-instructions.instructions.md` | Added Mockito matcher rule (all args must use matchers), string constant dedup rule |
| 1.7 | `code-guidance.md` | Strengthened `@RequiredArgsConstructor` from "preferred" to "required" with explicit constructor ban |

### Priority 2 — Context Budget

| Fix | File | Change |
|-----|------|--------|
| 2.1a | `java-architect.agent.md` | Added plan line cap: "MUST NOT exceed 200 lines excluding JSON payload examples" |
| 2.1b | `implementation-plan-template.md` | Removed Ownership, Risks/Notes, Linked Handoff sections; merged 4 payload example subsections into 1 |
| 2.2 | `review-report-template.json` | Compacted all phase1Checks and phase2Checks field names (e.g. `implementationMatchesPlanOrApprovedDeviations` → `implMatchesPlan`) |

### Priority 3 — Quality Tooling

| Fix | File | Change |
|-----|------|--------|
| 3.1 | `spotbugs-exclude.xml` | Reviewed: intentionally empty, no false positives to narrow — no edit needed |
| 3.2 | `checkstyle.xml` | Added `MultipleStringLiterals` rule with `allowedDuplicates=2` |
| 3.3 | `test-instructions.instructions.md` | Added: "Each plan slice must include at least one edge-case or boundary-condition test" |

### Priority 5 — Workflow Architecture (partial)

| Fix | File | Change |
|-----|------|--------|
| 5.1 | `scripts/smoke-test.sh` | NEW: Reusable smoke-test script (health, issues API default + filtered), exit 1 on failure |
| 5.3 | `implementation-report-template.json` | Added `smokeCheckEvidence` field (scriptUsed, exitCode, passCount, failCount, summary) |
| 5.3 | `implementation-signoff-template.json` | Added `smokeCheckEvidence` field (same structure) |

### Deferred

| Item | Reason |
|------|--------|
| Priority 4 — Agent hooks | Separate increment per user decision |
| Fix 5.2 — Coder model upgrade | User wants to give GPT-5.3-Codex another chance |

---

## Files Changed

### Agent Definitions
- `.github/agents/java-architect.agent.md` — plan line cap constraint
- `.github/agents/java-coder.agent.md` — curl step, no-unplanned-files, per-batch handoff
- `.github/agents/team-lead.agent.md` — curl gate before P2, red card counter clarification

### Instructions
- `.github/instructions/test-instructions.instructions.md` — Mockito matchers, string constants, edge-case rule

### Guidance
- `documentation/code-guidance.md` — `@RequiredArgsConstructor` mandate

### Templates
- `artifacts/templates/implementation-plan-template.md` — slimmed (Ownership, Risks, Linked Handoff removed; payloads merged)
- `artifacts/templates/review-report-template.json` — compacted field names
- `artifacts/templates/implementation-report-template.json` — smokeCheckEvidence field
- `artifacts/templates/implementation-signoff-template.json` — smokeCheckEvidence field

### Quality Config
- `flow-orchestrator/config/quality/checkstyle.xml` — MultipleStringLiterals rule

### Scripts
- `scripts/smoke-test.sh` — NEW reusable smoke-test script

---

## Verification

- [ ] `scripts/quality-check.sh` passes (Checkstyle rule must not flag existing code or be validated against current codebase)
- [ ] All edited files syntactically valid
- [ ] `scripts/smoke-test.sh` is executable and runs cleanly against a started app
